itemGroup.explosionoverhaul.main: Explosion Overhaul: A new level of destruction
message.explosionoverhaul.duplicate_entr: This entry is already on the list.
message.explosionoverhaul.invalid_entity: Entity not found in registry (use 'generic' for non-entity explosions).
message.explosionoverhaul.list_reset: List has been reset to defaults.
option.explosionoverhaul.enableAdvancedS: Enable Slow Sound Speed at Close Range
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.blacklist_butt: This button will redirect you to the page containing all blacklists.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.blacklist_cate: Blocks that must not be destroyed by explosions (e.g., bedrock).
Blocks that prevent the glass breaking effect from destroying them.
Control how the mod handles explosions from specific entities (e.g. TacZ grenades).
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.blacklist_info:
Compatibility Tips:
- For TACZ Grenades/Rockets: Use 'tacz:bullet' to control them explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.cameraShakeAmp: Multiplies the intensity of the camera shake. 0.0x = no shake, 1.0x = default.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.cameraSwayInte: Radius multiplier for the camera sway effect.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.concussionChan: Global multiplier for the chance of any concussion effect occurring.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.concussionDura: How long the concussion effects last after the explosion.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.cpuUsagePercen:
How much CPU power to dedicate to chunk scanning (1-100%).
100% = Maximum speed, uses all available processing power intensively
75% = Balanced (recommended), fast scanning with some CPU headroom
50% = Conservative, leaves room for other server processes
25% = Minimal impact, slowest but safest for busy servers
Lower values add delays between processing to reduce CPU load.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterApplyBlo:
How many blocks to process per server tick while applying crater changes.
Higher = faster crater application but potentially more TPS spikes.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterChunksPe:
Maximum number of chunks to process per tick when direct writes are enabled.
Use together with blocks/tick to smooth TPS.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterCoreRati:
For powerful explosions, this defines the crater's shape.
10% = very 'ray-like' (like a sun)
95% = almost a perfect sphere (solid bowl)
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterMaxFalli:
Caps the number of falling block entities spawned per tick during crater application.
Set to 0 to disable spawning in async mode.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterMaxThrea:
Maximum worker threads used for off-thread crater precomputation.
0 = Auto (use all available threads)
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterShapeInf: The 'Crater Core Ratio' setting only applies to explosions with a power of 40 or higher.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.craterSizeMult: This value multiplies the calculated base size.
Adjusts the diameter and depth of craters.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.deafnessChance: Probability multiplier for the deafness effect.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.dripstoneFalli: The radius around the player to search for pointed dripstone. High values can cause lag.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableAdvanced: If enabled, explosion sounds up to 240 meters will travel at slower speeds for a more epic effect. Beyond 240 meters, sound travels at 343 m/s. If disabled, sound always travels at 343 m/s.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableAmbientC: If an ambient cave explosion occurs, a visual dust effect will fall from the ceiling.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableAmbientE: Enables a system that simulates distant random explosions to create a battlefield atmosphere.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableAsyncCra:
Compute crater geometry off-thread and apply block changes in small batches per tick to keep TPS smooth on large explosions.

WARNING: When asynchronous and multi-threaded mode is enabled - destruction of VS objects - does not work.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableBlockInd:
Enables or disables the block indexing system.
When enabled, chunks are automatically scanned for Redstone Lamps, Pointed Dripstone, and Glass blocks.
When disabled, only manual registration/unregistration of blocks will occur.
This affects the performance of Redstone Lamp flickering, Pointed Dripstone falling effects, and Glass breaking effects near explosions.
Useful for servers that want to minimize background processing.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableCameraSh: Enables or disables the camera shake effect from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableCameraSw: Enables the disorientation camera sway effect.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableCaveSoun: Cave: A loud, reverberating sound when both player and explosion are in a cave.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableConcussi: Master switch for the entire concussion system (blur, deafness, heartbeat, etc.)
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableCraterDe: If false, explosions will still cause visual and sound effects, but won't break blocks.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableDeafness: Enables the high-pitched ringing effect after a close explosion.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableDirectCh:
Directly write block states into chunk sections instead of using Level#setBlock.
Much faster, but skips Forge block events and neighbor updates.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableDripston: Enables or disables the falling effect for pointed dripstone.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableExplosio: Enables or disables the clustering of nearby explosives into a single, more powerful explosion.
Enables the main fiery glow particles (glow, glow_2, sglow). Disabling can improve performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableFallingB: If enabled, blocks will be launched from explosions. This is a server-side setting.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableFlashEff: Enables the flash overlay effect on explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableGlassBre: Enables or disables glass being shattered by the explosion's shockwave.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableGroundDu: Enables the dust cloud effect from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableGroundMi: Enables the white mist cloud effect from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableHeartbea: Enables or disables visual screen pulsing and 'lub-dub' heartbeat sounds.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableLampFlic: Enables the flickering effect on Redstone Lamps near explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableLineSpar: Enables or disables sparks that shoot out from the explosion's epicenter.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableLowPass: Enables the muffled sound effect that dampens environmental audio.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableMistEffe: Enables the white mist effect that spreads from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enablePlasmaPa: Enables or disables plasma sparks entirely.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enablePlasmaSm: Enables the smoke trail that follows plasma sparks.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enablePlayerSh: Enables or disables the player shake effect from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableShockwav: Enables or disables the shockwave particle effect from explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableSurfaceS: Surface: A clear explosion sound in an open area.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.enableWindEffe: Enables wind effects on explosion particles (dust, mist, glow). Particles will move with wind direction and speed.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.flashMaxOpacit: Maximum opacity of the flash effect overlay. 0% = no flash, 100% = full opacity.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.glassBlocksPer: Max glass blocks to break in one go. Prevents lag from huge explosions.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.glassBreakingI: How often the server processes breaking glass (1 tick = 0.05s). Lower is smoother but more resource-intensive.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.glowTextureQua:
Sets the resolution for the main fireball textures.
Lower quality can improve performance. Requires resource reload (F3+T).
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.groundDustQual: Affects particle count and duration. Lower values improve performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.groundDustRayc: Controls how often dust particles check for the ground. Higher values can reduce performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.groundMistQual: Affects mist particle count and duration. Lower values improve performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.groundMistRayc: Controls how often mist particles check for the ground. Higher values can reduce performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.lampFlickerSea: The radius around the player to search for lamps. High values can cause lag.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.lineSparkAmoun: Multiplier for the number of sparks from explosions. Higher values may impact performance.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.lowPassChanceM: Probability multiplier for the low-pass effect.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.maxAmbientExpl: The maximum power a random 'Cataclysm' tier explosion can have.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.maxClusterPowe:
Maximum total power for clustered TNT explosions.
4 = minimum (single TNT)
100 = default (safe)
150+ = rendering lag risk
300+ = severe rendering issues
500+ = game crash risk
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.maxExplosionDi: Maximum distance in blocks from the player where an ambient sound can originate.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.maxScanThreads:
Maximum number of threads to use for chunk scanning.
Range is automatically adjusted for your system.
0 = Auto-detect (recommended): uses all available threads
1 = Single-threaded (safest for low-end systems)
Higher values = faster scanning but more CPU usage.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.maxTimeBetween: Maximum time in seconds between ambient explosion events.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.minExplosionDi: Minimum distance in blocks from the player where an ambient sound can originate.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.minTimeBetween: Minimum time in seconds between ambient explosion events.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.mistQuality: Affects mist particle count and duration.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.mistRaycastFre: Controls how often mist particles check for the ground.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.particleRender:
Choose between three particle rendering systems:
Realistic: Current system with complex animated sprite sheets (better quality)
Realistic 2: Optimized system with single large particle (best performance)
Vanilla-like: Uses simple textures with color phases (good performance)
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.particleSizeSc:
Scales the size of all explosion particles across all render modes.
100 = default size (1.0x), 10 = 10% of default (0.1x), 500 = 500% of default (5.0x).
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.plasmaSmokeCou: Number of smoke particles spawned per plasma tick. Original was 2.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.plasmaSmokeFre: How often smoke spawns from plasma particles. 0% = no smoke, 25% = reduced, 70% = original.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.playerShakeAmp: Multiplies the intensity of the player shake (side-to-side movement). 0.0x = no shake, 1.0x = default.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.powerTiersHead: Weights for different explosion power levels in 'Single' and 'Shelling' events.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.reset_list: Hold SHIFT and click to reset this list to its original defaults
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.scenariosHeade: Configure the types and frequency of different ambient explosion events.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.showHeartbeatH: Shows a BPM/BPS counter in the top-right corner of the screen.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.showScanProgre:
Controls visibility of the scanning progress HUD in the top-left corner.
Shows percentage of chunks scanned during world initialization.
Automatically hides when scanning is complete.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.show_defaults: Toggle to view the built-in protected blocks.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.sourcemode_def: The mod handles this explosion with all overhaul effects enabled.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.sourcemode_no_: Modifies the explosion to cause zero block damage, while keeping all visual and sound effects.
Same as NO DESTRUCTION, but also prevents the specialized 'Glass Breaking' effect.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.sourcemode_van: Bypasses all mod effects. This explosion will behave exactly as in vanilla Minecraft.
tooltip.explosionoverhaul.windSpeedMulti: Controls the global wind speed affecting all particles. 1.0 = normal speed, 1.5 = 50% faster, 2.0 = double speed.
warning.explosionoverhaul.crashRisk: WARNING: GAME CRASH RISK WITH LARGE EXPLOSIONS
warning.explosionoverhaul.renderingLag: WARNING: LARGE EXPLOSIONS MAY CAUSE RENDERING LAG
warning.explosionoverhaul.severeRenderin: WARNING: LARGE EXPLOSIONS MAY CAUSE SEVERE RENDERING LAG
